# Paddock

> Cross-series motorsport calendar, schedules, results, standings, drivers, and champions data for 15 championships — Formula 1, MotoGP, WEC, Formula E, WRC, IndyCar, NASCAR, IMSA, DTM, F2, F3, WSBK, GT World Challenge, Nürburgring Langstrecken-Serie, and the ADAC Ravenol 24h Nürburgring.

Paddock aggregates 15 motorsport championships in one place: race calendars in venue-local time, weather forecasts, news feeds, results and standings (where curated), and historical champions data going back as far as 1949. Open-access PWA at paddock-tracker.com; no paywall.

## Entry points
- [Home](https://paddock-tracker.com): Cross-series next-session timeline.
- [Calendar](https://paddock-tracker.com/calendar): Every session in date order, filterable by series.
- [Blog](https://paddock-tracker.com/blog): Original motorsport analysis.
- [Changelog](https://paddock-tracker.com/changelog): Site release notes.
- [About](https://paddock-tracker.com/about): What Paddock is and how it is built.

## Series
- [Formula 1](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f1): F1 calendar, weekend schedules, drivers, champions 1950–2025.
- [MotoGP](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/motogp): MotoGP calendar, champions 1949–2025.
- [World Endurance Championship (WEC)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wec): WEC calendar, champions 2012–2025.
- [World Superbike (WSBK)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wsbk): WSBK calendar, champions 1988–2025.
- [Formula E](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/formula-e): Formula E calendar.
- [IndyCar](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/indycar): IndyCar calendar.
- [NASCAR Cup Series](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/nascar-cup): NASCAR Cup calendar.
- [IMSA SportsCar Championship](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/imsa): IMSA calendar, champions 2014–2025.
- [Formula 2 (F2)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f2): F2 calendar, champions 2005–2025 (incl. GP2).
- [Formula 3 (F3)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/f3): F3 calendar, champions 2010–2025 (incl. GP3).
- [DTM](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/dtm): DTM calendar, champions 1984–2025.
- [GT World Challenge](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/gt-world): GTWC calendar, champions 2014–2025.
- [World Rally Championship (WRC)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/wrc): WRC calendar with stage timetables.
- [Nürburgring Langstrecken-Serie (NLS)](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/nls): NLS calendar.
- [ADAC Ravenol 24h Nürburgring](https://paddock-tracker.com/series/adac-ravenol-24h): 24h race calendar and past winners.

## Feeds
- [RSS feed](https://paddock-tracker.com/feed.xml): Blog posts and release notes.

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://paddock-tracker.com/privacy): GDPR-compliant privacy practices.
- [Terms of Service](https://paddock-tracker.com/terms): Site usage terms.
- [Cookie Policy](https://paddock-tracker.com/cookies): Cookie inventory and Consent Mode details.
- [Accessibility](https://paddock-tracker.com/accessibility): WCAG 2.2 commitments.
- [Do Not Sell or Share My Information](https://paddock-tracker.com/do-not-sell): CCPA/GPC opt-out.
- [Imprint (English)](https://paddock-tracker.com/imprint): DDG §5 imprint.
- [Impressum (Deutsch)](https://paddock-tracker.com/impressum): § 5 DDG Impressum.
